calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-17-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Daniel Stern, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: Parcmerced Investors Properties, LLC, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendants Hrigu Seth and Vishwas Sojitra.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 810 Gonzalez Drive #8G, San Francisco, CA 94132.
The lease is forfeited.
Past-due rent - $7509.50
Holdover Damages - $0.00
Costs - $0.00
Total - $7509.50

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-17-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Park Merced Investors Properties is present. Represented by Julie Anderson.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Hrigu Seth IS NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. Notice of Settlement Defective, SC noticed for "JAN-12-11." The trial date of JAN-17-2012 remains on calendar.
